## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify the purpose of the Monday SEO sync and address ongoing website content publishing issues.](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Monday SEO sync deemed unnecessary; team will rely on Thursday calls and ad-hoc communication via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Website publishing validation errors persist; Cameron to investigate and provide an update by EOD](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [GrowthX team to propose a list of blog posts for the week, focusing on alternatives/comparisons and Shopify alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

## Topics

### Meeting Schedule Optimization

  - [Monday SEO sync originally set up for Prateek's action items and team collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [Decided to cancel regular Monday sync in favor of Thursday calls and as-needed Slack communication](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Cameron (website-focused) available for flexible, smaller calls to hash out details when necessary](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=269.0)

### Website Publishing Issues

  - [GrowthX publisher encountered validation failures while attempting to publish articles](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Similar issue occurred previously due to Japan team's changes in blog categories](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Cameron hypothesizes a conflict with mandatory fields preventing publication](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Action: Cameron to investigate using test blogs and provide an update by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [GrowthX to ensure their publisher contacts Cameron directly for troubleshooting](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)

### Content Planning

  - [GrowthX team to deliver proposed list of blog posts by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Focus on alternatives/comparisons content](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Incorporating Shopify alternatives as suggested by Ritesh in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Team Introductions

  - [Jenn Peters introduced as GrowthX managing editor supporting Megan on Firework account](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [Jenn's role: strategy, editing, managing writers, and occasional content creation](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cameron to delete the recurring Monday SEO sync meeting](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=318.0)
  - [Cameron to investigate and resolve website publishing validation errors](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [GrowthX publisher to contact Cameron directly regarding publishing issues](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [GrowthX team to deliver proposed blog post list by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Team to continue communication via Slack and Thursday calls, with ad-hoc meetings as needed](https://fathom.video/share/RU1ajUCxnHjmBioGpMwbUy1EjP91y9x6?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
